summary: Comprehensive testing of Actor's Companion app completed. Backend API 85.7% success rate with only PDF export issue. Frontend fully functional with excellent UI/UX and complete integration working.

non_critical_bugs.issue: FPDF error: Not enough horizontal space to render text
non_critical_bugs.details: Issue occurs when rendering long text content in PDF - needs better text wrapping/truncation

passed_tests: Frontend page loading with dark theater theme
Breakdown view with all required sections
Navigation between upload and breakdown views
All UI components have proper data-testid attributes

action_item_for_main_agent.pdf_export_fix: Fix FPDF text rendering issue in /api/export-pdf/{id} endpoint. Add proper text wrapping and length limits for multi_cell operations to prevent 'Not enough horizontal space' error.
